synthesis.driver: US-Iran strikes and Hormuz closure fears are lifting Brent despite oversupply capping larger gains.

takes.strait of hormuz closure heightens us ir: Closure threat adds war premium, pushing prices up despite global oversupply.
takes.gold falls as us iran strikes boost oil: US-Iran strikes inject risk premium, lifting oil prices despite soft demand.
takes.u s and iran trade strikes and conflicti: Strikes near Hormuz escalate tensions, supporting oil prices against supply glut.
takes.iran expands attacks on gulf states afte: Iran's attacks and Hormuz closure claims amplify war premium, driving prices higher.
